name: Agent Knock Knock
description: Agent Knock Knock (AKK/akk) delegates OpenClaw coding work to local Codex, Claude, or Cursor agents. Use this plugin when the user says AKK, akk, Agent Knock Knock, asks to hand work to Codex, Claude, or Cursor, asks what agent tasks are running, asks what an AKK, Codex, or Claude session is about, sends a follow-up to an agent task, renews monitoring for a stalled terminal task, recovers an unavailable agent session, cancels a running agent task, or closes an agent task. Default delegation target comes from plugin config defaultAgent and falls back to Codex when unset; explicit user agent requests override it.

binPath.description: Path to agent-knock-knock CLI. Defaults to this package's dist/src/cli.js build output.

workspace.description: Default workspace for delegated coding-agent tasks.

defaultAgent.description: Default coding agent for unspecified AKK delegations. If unset, Agent Knock Knock falls back to codex.

defaultClaudeSession.description: Default Claude Code session name. claudeSession remains supported as a compatibility alias.

codexAllProxy.description: ALL_PROXY value used when launching Codex through ACPX.

cursorAllProxy.description: ALL_PROXY value used when launching Cursor through ACPX.

codexModel.description: ACPX model id used when launching Codex.

cursorModel.description: ACPX model id used when launching Cursor.

model.description: ACPX model id used when launching coding agents.

allProxy.description: ALL_PROXY value used when launching coding agents through ACPX.

openclawSession.description: Default OpenClaw session label stored in the protocol state.

gatewayUrl.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Plugin callbacks use OpenClaw's configured Gateway target and do not forward this value.

gatewayToken.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Plugin callbacks use OpenClaw's Gateway credentials and never forward this value to coding agents.

openclawBin.description: Path to the OpenClaw CLI used by callback delivery. Defaults to PATH plus common user install locations.

callbackCommand.description: Optional callback command template. {statePath} and {state_path} are replaced with the shell-quoted state path.

idleTimeoutMinutes.description: Minutes an idle AKK session remains open before lazy cleanup closes it. Defaults to 10080.

agentTimeoutMinutes.description: Minutes without terminal activity or a coding-agent callback before AKK marks a task stalled. Defaults to 60.

agentHardTimeoutMinutes.description: Fallback lifetime ceiling for a terminal bridge monitor that has not produced approval or completion. Defaults to 720 minutes.

autoApprove.description: Deterministic Codex terminal approval policy. Disabled by default and never exposed as model-controlled tool parameters.
